use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations
Outline-style buttons for secondary actions in UI toolbars
Icon-only buttons for compact navigation or tool controls
Ghost buttons for subtle UI interactions in overlays
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible Button component with 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and proper focus/disabled states. Designed as a reusable atomic component for any UI system requiring interactive controls.
